stories.title: Stacey King, 3-time champ with Bulls, dies at 59
stories.summary: Stacey King, a three-time NBA champion with the Chicago Bulls who became a fan favorite on their broadcast team after his playing career, has died at 59.

stories.title: Zverev wins French Open for 1st Grand Slam title
stories.summary: Alexander Zverev beat Flavio Cobolli 6-1, 4-6, 6-4, 6-7 (5), 6-1 to win the French Open title.

stories.title: Sources: Nelson promoted to 76ers' No. 2 exec
stories.summary: The 76ers are promoting assistant general manager Jameer Nelson to be team's executive vice president of basketball operations under new president Mike Gansey, making the one-time NBA All-Star the No. 2 executive for the franchise, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Lawsuit aims to halt UFC White House spectacle
stories.summary: A federal lawsuit seeks to halt the UFC fight card on the White House South Lawn, a show timed for President Trump's 80th birthday and touted as part of the celebration of the nation's 250th anniversary.

stories.title: Denmark says Eriksen conscious after collapsing
stories.summary: A friendly between Denmark and Ukraine has been called off after Christian Eriksen collapsed on the pitch.
